notes: ISF (impot de solidarite sur la fortune) final years. LFI 2015 forecast 5.6bn EUR; DGFiP executed 5224 MEUR. Realized ~7% below forecast.

IFI (impot sur la fortune immobiliere) first year replacing ISF. PLF 2018 forecast 850 MEUR; Senat ISF/IFI bilan reports net realized 1291 MEUR (52% ABOVE forecast). IFI is a narrowed real-estate-only base; realized exceeded the deliberately conservative forecast.
IFI second year. LFI 2019 forecast 1.5bn EUR; realized 2105 MEUR (per PLF 2022 Voies et moyens tome I ligne 1406). Realized ABOVE forecast.

IFI 2020. PLF 2022 Voies et moyens tome I ligne 1406 states verbatim: recettes 2016 MEUR in 2020 vs LFI 2020 prevision 2105 MEUR. Strongest single-document forecast-vs-realized pair; realized ~4% below forecast.

Norway wealth tax. Original Prop.1 LS 2021-2022 forecast ~21bn NOK before the new govt 2022 hike (rate to ~1.1pct top bracket above 20m + reduced share/business-asset valuation discount). SSB table 10333 assessed (utlignet) total 26.32bn NOK (state 7.94bn + kommune 18.39bn). Realized ABOVE original pre-hike forecast because the hike lifted the base.

Norway wealth tax 2023. Prop.1 LS 2022-2023 forecast ~29.5bn NOK (officially om lag 30 mrd). SSB table 10333 assessed total 29.40bn NOK (state 9.50bn + kommune 19.90bn). Realized ~0.3pct below forecast despite reported HNW emigration to Switzerland.

Spain Impuesto Temporal de Solidaridad de las Grandes Fortunas (Ley 38/2022). Govt/Hacienda announced ~1.5bn EUR potential collection at enactment (2022 Programa de Estabilidad); AEAT Informe Anual de Recaudacion 2023 reports 623 MEUR realized for tax year 2022 (collected 2023) from 12010 declarantes. Realized ~58pct BELOW forecast; large yield gap. 89pct of revenue from Madrid residents.

Colombia permanent impuesto al patrimonio (Ley 2277 de 2022). MHCP exposicion de motivos Tabla 1 line 1.2 Patrimonio forecast additional annual revenue 2663 miles de millones COP (0.18pct PIB Calculos DGPM-MHCP). DIAN F-420 aggregates ano gravable 2023 (32118 declarantes) impuesto a cargo casilla 41 = 1193420.617 millones COP. Realized ~45pct of forecast; provisional figures.
